mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 147 > items > The respirator includes tank that can provide nours
mechanics.excerpt: The respirator includes tank that can provide nours breathable air; Additiona tanks can be worn, but these increase the mass of the respirator system and automatically encumber the wearer; up t0 three total tanks can be worn, but this makes the character very encumbered BURVIVAL OEAR Whether on a uninhabitable planet, in room filled with gas or simply camping the mountains; characters will need some amount of specialized gear.
